The '''1st Tapani Assault Battlegroup''' was the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army's]] central unit in the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]].

During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the 1st Tapani was led by [[Major General]] [[Tessala Corvae]] from its headquarters on [[Tallaan]]. It was involved in the [[Rout of Spuma]] and [[Humiliation of Barkhesh]], although with significant cost in the latter event due to losing a fifth of its troopers to [[Acid rain/Legends|acid rain]].<ref name="ISB" />
